name: SDXL Background Generator
description: AI-generated backgrounds for the companion avatar using SDXL Turbo. Requires NVIDIA GPU.
author: Crow

env_vars.name: SDXL_BACKGROUNDS_DIR
env_vars.description: Directory for generated background images and gallery

env_vars.name: SDXL_MODEL_CACHE
env_vars.description: HuggingFace model cache directory (SDXL Turbo + SVD weights)

notes: Requires nvidia-container-toolkit on the host. Models (~25GB) download automatically on first start. Used by the AI Companion for dynamic backgrounds and by the storage server's crow_generate_background tool.
